name: Project-AI & OCTOREFLEX
tagline: Syscall-authoritative governance & control-theoretic containment for sovereign AGI.
summary: A modular, self-aware AI assistant ecosystem with eBPF-mediated syscall governance, deterministic policy enforcement, and a control-theoretic containment loop (OCTOREFLEX) ensuring every model action is observable, attributable, and reversible.

name: Cerberus Guard Bot
tagline: A hardened, multi-agent shield for AI-to-AGI systems.
summary: Three guardians in distinct coding styles, coordinated by a central hub. Any bypass attempt spawns three new randomized guardians — exponential growth capped at 27 before total shutdown. Designed to neutralize jailbreaks, prompt-injections, and bot attacks before they reach the model surface.

name: Hub of Epstein Files Directory
summary: A comprehensive directory and organizational hub for Epstein-related public files and documentation. Includes a full web interface, automated workflows, and AI agent infrastructure. Strictly educational and research-oriented — no original allegations, no targeting, no editorial conclusions.

name: Mental Health Escalation Router
tagline: Real-time detection of high-risk distress signals and safe routing to human resources.
summary: A defensive layer for any AI surface that may receive crisis-laden input. Detects acute distress signals, suppresses generative responses that could harm, and routes the user to verified human resources within bounded latency.

name: civic-attest
tagline: Deterministic, cryptographically verifiable, publicly auditable authenticity for high-trust public communications.
summary: A signing and attestation framework for institutional speech. Every statement carries a verifiable provenance chain — issuer, time, content hash, revocation status — that any observer can audit without trust.

name: Global Incident Early Warning Aggregator
tagline: Aggregate multi-source telemetry and detect anomaly patterns at planetary scale.
summary: A signal-fusion pipeline that ingests open telemetry feeds, normalizes them into a unified anomaly schema, and surfaces emerging incidents before they hit traditional reporting channels.

name: Open Access Knowledge Distiller
tagline: Transform research papers into structured, verifiable knowledge graphs.
summary: OAKD ingests open-access scientific and technical documents and produces structured, provenance-tagged knowledge graphs suitable for downstream LLM grounding, peer review automation, and academic discovery.

name: Open Constraint Enforcement Engine
tagline: Evaluate actions against formally declared invariants — before execution.
summary: A pre-execution gate that compiles invariants into deterministic checks and refuses any action whose effect would violate a declared constraint. The substrate beneath OCTOREFLEX's governance loop.

name: Digital Identity Capability Proof Service
tagline: Privacy-preserving attribute verification using zero-knowledge proofs.
summary: DICPS lets a holder prove a capability (age, residency, credential) without disclosing the underlying attribute. Built on standardized ZK primitives with selective-disclosure semantics.

name: Thirsty's Monolith
tagline: The one Code To Rule Them All.
summary: Unified core that links Project-AI, Cerberus, and the Waterfall firewall under a single deterministic build, deploy, and observability surface.

name: Thirsty's Waterfall
tagline: A firewall — except it's a waterfall, because I'm thirsty.
summary: A multi-stage egress and ingress filter built on the Waterfall metaphor: every packet flows through cascading inspection layers, each with its own policy and provenance.

name: Thirsty-lang
tagline: A language for anyone and everyone who is Thirsty.
summary: A constitutional, governance-aware programming language and ecosystem with first-class hooks for TARL/NIRL invariants, deterministic compilation, and a 40+ repo template family.

name: Optical Flow Epicenter Detection
tagline: Locate the precise spatial-temporal origin of motion events.
summary: A research-grade pipeline using dense optical flow and back-propagated trajectories to identify the exact frame and pixel-region where an event began — for forensic analysis, sports tactics, and scientific imaging.

name: Codex Workflow
tagline: 24/7 aggressive patrol bot for any repository.
summary: A continuously-running CI agent that cleans, fixes, and secures every pushed line of code across all branches. Configurable patrol intensity and policy bundles.

name: MicroService Generator
summary: Generates fully-formed FastAPI microservices with TARL/NIRL hook stubs, Dockerfile, compose entry, Makefile, tests, and observability defaults — no placeholders.

name: The Triumvirate
tagline: Three sovereign AGI roles in dynamic equilibrium.
summary: A governance topology defining Architect, Guardian, and Operator agents whose mutual checks bound capability and prevent unilateral drift.
